records.ety: [F. transplanter, L. transplantare; trans across, over + plantare to plant. See Plant.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Transplanted; p. pr. & vb. n. Transplanting.]

defs: To remove, and plant in another place; as, to transplant trees.
To remove, and settle or establish for residence in another place; as, to transplant inhabitants.
quotes: Being transplanted out of his cold, barren diocese of St. David into a warmer climate.
